params.lpToken: Address of the LP token (e.g., VFIDE/ETH Uniswap LP)
params.name: Pool name for display
params.rewardRate: VFIDE rewards per second per LP token (scaled by 1e18)

compound(address).details: Only works for pools where one side is VFIDE

addPool(address,string,uint256).notice: Add a new LP token pool

claimRewards(address).notice: Claim pending rewards H-2 Fix: Add nonReentrant to prevent reentrancy

compound(address).notice: Compound rewards (stake rewards as more LP - only if VFIDE LP)

pendingRewards(address,address).notice: Get pending rewards for a user in a pool

stake(address,uint256).notice: Stake LP tokens H-2 Fix: Add nonReentrant to prevent reentrancy via malicious LP tokens

unstake(address,uint256).notice: Unstake LP tokens H-2 Fix: Add nonReentrant to prevent reentrancy via malicious LP tokens
